text:
In the faraway land of Eldoria, there sprawled a great forest where music sung by tiny woodland fairies was heard all day. Among these beautiful creatures lived Holly Harmony, the most gifted musician dwarf ever. One spring morning, a sudden gust of wind swept through the forest clearing. Holly heard a song wafting beyond the trees—it was a melody she'd composed herself years ago.

Excited, Holly sought out the source. Her keen ears led her to the edge of the woods, where a peculiar old oak tree stood. Its leaves hadn’t grown since ages past, and its branches seemed to hold an invisible harp.

Carefully climbing the gnarled trunk, Holly felt something resonate through the tree bark. With a determined leap, she joined the hollow space inside.

To her astonishment, she wasn’t alone. Nestled among the ancient vine crests were hundreds—count them out loud—birds. These birds chirped songbirdsongs. Each feathered inhabitant possessed
